name: n8n-nodes-email-parser
description: n8n community node for parsing raw email messages with mailparser.
author: Vitali Quiering <vitali@fastmask.app>

scripts.release:version: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const pkg=require('./package.json'); const version=process.argv[1]; if(!version){console.error('Usage: npm run release:version -- <version>'); process.exit(1);} pkg.version=version; fs.writeFileSync('package.json', JSON.stringify(pkg, null, 2) + '\n'); console.log('Updated package.json to', version);"
scripts.release:tag: node -e "const {execFileSync}=require('child_process'); const version=require('./package.json').version; const tag=`v${version}`; execFileSync('git',['add','package.json'],{stdio:'inherit'}); execFileSync('git',['commit','-m',`release: ${tag}`],{stdio:'inherit'}); execFileSync('git',['tag',tag],{stdio:'inherit'}); execFileSync('git',['push','origin'],{stdio:'inherit'}); execFileSync('git',['push','origin',tag],{stdio:'inherit'}); console.log('Pushed', tag);"
